title: cordyline reflexa
intro: Cordyline reflexa, also known as the cabbage palm or palm lily, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia, New Zealand, and parts of the Pacific Islands. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Cordyline reflexa include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Cordyline reflexa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
